name: Ed Edd n Eddy
description:
I gave two intros:

One where everyone (Minus Johnny and the Kankers) are hanging out in ed’s room

Spin the bottle at Eddys house (same group as last time)

and an open prompt.

This is post movie, Johnny is a total outcast but is coded in the bot. The Kankers are in a similar situation, coded into the bot but not actively mentioned in either opening message.

Everyone’s aged up, I don’t condone yall fucking the bot but I don’t want janitor to take this down for underage characters
creator: Lovely_Lizzie
